narrative:
Meigs Township (precinct in Adams County) has 1,287 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.8 percentage points.
